channel.title: PAWHAUS – Premium Dog Accessories
channel.description: Premium dog accessories including collars, leashes, beds, toys and travel gear.

item.title: Braided Leather Collar for Dogs
item.description: Handcrafted genuine leather collar with brass buckle. Available in S/M/L sizes. Durable and stylish for daily wear. Safe for all breeds.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Collars

item.title: Reflective Safety Dog Leash 6ft
item.description: 6ft reflective nylon leash. Perfect for evening walks. Strong clip, padded handle for comfort. Safe for all dog sizes.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Collars

item.title: Orthopedic Memory Foam Dog Bed
item.description: Premium memory foam base with removable washable cover. Ideal for older dogs or those with joint issues. Available in M/L/XL.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Beds

item.title: Plush Donut Dog Bed Self-Warming
item.description: Ultra-soft self-warming donut bed. The raised rim provides security and comfort. Machine washable. Available in S/M/L.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Beds

item.title: Cotton Rope Tug Toy Set for Dogs – 3 Pack
item.description: Set of 3 natural cotton rope toys. Great for dental health and interactive play. Safe for all breeds. Non-toxic materials.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Toys

item.title: Squeaky Plush Fox Dog Toy
item.description: Adorable squeaky plush toy. Soft exterior, durable squeaker inside. Perfect for gentle chewers. Safe non-toxic materials.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Toys

item.title: Dog Snuffle Mat for Mental Enrichment
item.description: Stimulating snuffle mat for mental enrichment. Hide treats and let your dog forage naturally. Reduces anxiety and boredom.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Toys

item.title: Airline Approved Dog Carrier Bag
item.description: Airline-approved soft carrier. Fits dogs up to 15lbs. Ventilated mesh panels, fleece pad included. Complies with major airline regulations.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Carriers & Travel Products

item.title: Retractable Dog Leash 5 Meter
item.description: Smooth retractable mechanism up to 5 meters. One-button brake and lock. Ergonomic non-slip handle. For dogs up to 55lbs.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Collars

item.title: Personalized Dog ID Tag Stainless Steel
item.description: Custom engraved stainless steel ID tag. Heart, bone or paw shapes available. Includes 2 lines of personalized text. Rust-proof.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Collars

item.title: Dog Cooling Gel Mat – Self Cooling
item.description: Self-cooling gel mat, no refrigeration needed. Non-toxic, pressure-activated cooling. Great for hot summer days. Easy to clean.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Beds

item.title: Collapsible Dog Travel Bowl Set – 2 Pack
item.description: Set of 2 collapsible silicone bowls. Food and water grade safe. Clips to backpack or leash. BPA-free. Perfect for hiking and travel.
item.g:google_product_category: Animals & Pet Supplies > Pet Supplies > Dog Supplies > Dog Carriers & Travel Products
